title: V++
description: The most optimized modpack in existence centered around Vulkan
body:
# **General**

Tired of lag spikes, crashes, and freezing screens? This modpack is the perfect solution for you! Centered around VulkanMod, this modpack brings the most powerful optimization mods in existence and puts them together, along with a few quality of life mods, to get rid of lag once and for all. You can finally raise your render distance from the 8 chunks the potatoe you are playing on can handle!

# **Testing**

I conducted tests to compare between vanilla, sodium, and VK++. Here are the results:

- Vanilla: 90-130 FPS
- Sodium: 300-400 FPS
- VK++: 800-900 FPS


Conditions:
- 24 chunk render distance
- 16 chunk simulation distance
- Fancy graphics
- FPS unlimited
- FOV 100
- Launcher: Modrinth
- GPU: dedicated
- Cooling fan: Maximum performance
- 6BG allocated RAM

PC specs:
- rtx 4050 Nvidia GPU (6GB VRAM)
- Intel core i7
- 16 GB RAm
- 1980 * 1080 display
- 165hz refresh rate

# **Suggestions**
- Don't add too many suff to MiniHud because it impacts FPS
- Raise your render distance until the FPS starts approaching your monitors refresh rate (Any framerate above the refresh rate of the monitor only wastes GPU and CPU usage)
- If you are on a weak device, use Modern Fix's guide on running the game with minimum RAM allocated
- Use a launcher like modrinth or prism to make installation of this pack easier and modifying it also easier (Resource packs)
- If you add mods to this pack, double check compatibility because Vulkan is incompatible with so many mods
